name: custom-detrended-v3
description: v3 CANDIDATE: v2's 10 families with the linear-trend (trend_seasonal_ar) and log-growth (multiplicative) terms drawn as a BIMODAL total EXCURSION instead of v2's slope*t, making the effective trend ~16x weaker and bimodal (~75% low-trend + ~25% trending). Fixes v2's largest measured defect: excess linear trend (v2 corpus trend-strength median ~0.42 at length 1536 vs real weather ~0.026). Persistence & family weights unchanged from v2. Beats v2 robustly on real weather at ctx 1024 (+12.9%) and ctx 1536 / gen-max 4096 (+8.4%, the production length). NOT yet validated at production CONTEXT 4096 or on trending/multi-domain data at high fidelity (see README). Fully seed-deterministic.
